meta.summary: MAKER 3 genome annotation pipeline runtime packaged from Bioconda with core helper tools for evidence-based eukaryotic genome annotation.
meta.description: MAKER 3 genome annotation pipeline runtime packaged from Bioconda with core helper tools for evidence-based eukaryotic genome annotation.

test: maker -help 2>&1 | grep -F 'MAKER is a program that produces gene annotations' >/dev/null && maker -help 2>&1 | grep -F -- '-CTL' >/dev/null

set -e; tmp=/tmp/taf-maker-ctl-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; maker -CTL >/tmp/taf-maker-ctl.log 2>&1; test -s maker_opts.ctl; test -s maker_bopts.ctl; test -s maker_exe.ctl; grep -F 'genome=' maker_opts.ctl >/dev/null; grep -F 'protein=' maker_opts.ctl >/dev/null; grep -F 'blastn=' maker_exe.ctl >/dev/null; grep -F 'exonerate=' maker_exe.ctl >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp" /tmp/taf-maker-ctl.log

mpiexec --version 2>&1 | grep -Ei 'HYDRA|MPICH|Open MPI' >/dev/null && blastn -version 2>&1 | grep -F 'blastn: 2.14.1+' >/dev/null && makeblastdb -version 2>&1 | grep -F 'makeblastdb: 2.14.1+' >/dev/null && { exonerate --version 2>&1 || true; } | grep -Ei 'exonerate|version' >/dev/null && { RepeatMasker -version 2>&1 || true; } | grep -Ei 'RepeatMasker|version' >/dev/null && rmblastn -version 2>&1 | grep -F 'rmblastn: 2.14.1+' >/dev/null && { snap 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F 'usage:' >/dev/null && { augustus --version 2>&1 || true; } | grep -Ei 'AUGUSTUS|version' >/dev/null

set -e; tmp=/tmp/taf-maker-blast-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; printf '>ctg1\nACGTTGCAAGTCGATCGTACGATGCTAGCTAGGATCCGTTACGATCGATCGTAGCTAGCATCGGATCGAACGTAGC\n' > tiny.fa; makeblastdb -in tiny.fa -dbtype nucl -out tinydb >/tmp/taf-maker-makeblastdb.log 2>&1; blastn -query tiny.fa -db tinydb -out blast.out -outfmt 6 -dust no -word_size 7 >/tmp/taf-maker-blastn.log 2>&1; test -s blast.out; grep -F 'ctg1' blast.out >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp" /tmp/taf-maker-makeblastdb.log /tmp/taf-maker-blastn.log

upstream.name: MAKER
upstream.license: Academic/non-commercial MAKER terms; Artistic-2.0 or GPL terms stated upstream; commercial use requires a separate upstream license; bundled dependencies keep their own licenses
upstream.citation: Cantarel et al. 2008, MAKER; Holt and Yandell 2011, MAKER2
